UI_trait_AT_AnthroImmunity_desc:
Knox Infection is very rare, even from bites.
Per bite: %1%
Per laceration: %2%
Per scratch: %3%
UI_trait_AT_BeastOfBurden_desc:
Your body's frame is well-built for carrying weight.
Weight cap increases by %1%
UI_trait_AT_Bug_o_ssieur_desc:
NOT WORKING IN MP. Your ancestors weren't shy about eating insects.
You don't gain unhappiness or boredom when eating insects.
Insects are %1% more nutritious.
Your chances of foraging for insects are increased by %2%.
UI_trait_AT_BullRush_desc:
You have horns or another feature built for knocking opponents about.
When sprinting, knock zombies over at the cost of endurance.
UI_trait_AT_Carnivore_desc:
Foods mostly comprised of meat are %1% more nutritious, plants %2% less.
Raw meat doesn't make you sick.
Your chances of foraging for dead animals are increased by %3%.
UI_trait_AT_CarrionEater_desc:
Your bloodline has gifted you an iron stomach.
Rotten meat is %1% more nutritious.
Rotten and/or raw meat doesn't make you sick.
Your chances of foraging for dead animals are increased by %2%.
UI_trait_AT_Digitigrade_desc:
You lightly walk on your toes (paws or claws) and your legs are build for sneaking/running.
Stomps do %1% more damage, but your carry weight is decreased by %2%.
Your paws/claws cannot be scratched.
+1 Sprinting
+1 Stealth
+1 Lightfoot
UI_trait_AT_Exclaimer_desc:
The need to warn others of danger runs deep.
%1% chance to yell per minute, when at panic level 2.
Higher panic levels mean much more yelling.
UI_trait_AT_FeralBody_desc:
NOT WORKING IN MP. Your body has a more feral form. You are faster, but most clothes feel restricting to you.
You move %1% faster, but (most) clothes give you %2 point(s) of discomfort (%3x if any defensive stats above %4).
UI_trait_AT_FeralDigestion_desc:
Foods poisonous to ferals have %1 poison power for you.
(Foods not selected for this trait may still be poisonous to some pets!
Please be careful in what you feed them!)
UI_trait_AT_FoodMotivated_desc:
You are particularly delighted by food.
Food makes you %1 points happier and less bored;
Dog food doesn't make you unhappy.
UI_trait_AT_Herbivore_desc:
Foods mostly comprised of plants are %1% more nutritious, meats %2% less so.
Raw plants don't make you sick.
Poisonous plants affect you as normal.
Your chances of foraging for vegetables, berries and fruits are increased by %3%.
UI_trait_AT_Lonely_desc:
Being solitary never suited you or your pack.
After %1 hours without seeing a player, lose %2% happiness per hour.
UI_trait_AT_LowEndHunter_desc:
You prefer to sneak up to your target and pounce on them. You are not made for long chases.
+1 Sprinting
+1 Sneak
-1 Fitness
Endurance recovery is decreased by %1%.
UI_trait_AT_NaturalTumbler_desc:
Your body is built for short falls.
You fall at %1% the normal acceleration.
UI_trait_AT_Stinky_desc:
You have a tendency to stink. Worse, you're nose-blind to it.
If you're too dirty, Zombies will be more attracted to you.
Other players may comment on your smell.
UI_trait_AT_Tail_desc:
You have a tail, which allows you to run with more balance.
Reduces trip chance by %1%.
Doesn't work for tripping through trees/bushes.
UI_trait_AT_Torpor_desc:
Your ancestors hibernated, and part of that urge passed to you.
You have %1% less endurance during the cold months.
UI_trait_AT_Unguligrade_desc:
You walk on the reinforced tip of your toes (hooves) and your legs are built for running.
Stomps do %1% more damage, but your carry weight is decreased by %2%.
Your hooves cannot be scratched, lacerated, or bitten.
Broken glass still affects your feet.
+1 Sprinting
+1 Nimble
UI_trait_AT_UnwieldyHands_desc:
Your hands have less fingers than a human, or simply don't work as well.
Actions requiring fine motor control are %1% slower.
UI_trait_AT_VestigialWings_desc:
You gained semi-working wings from somewhere in your bloodline.
You are immune to all fall damage.
UI_trait_AT_VoiceAvian_desc:
Adds a %1% chance for exclamations (Exclaimer) to be mistaken for animal sounds and ignored by zombies.
Your warning calls are also more bird-like.
UI_trait_AT_VoiceFeline_desc:
Adds a %1% chance for exclamations (Exclaimer) to be mistaken for animal sounds and ignored by zombies.
Your warning calls are also more feline.
UI_trait_AT_VoiceSheep_desc:
Adds a %1% chance for exclamations (Exclaimer) to be mistaken for animal sounds and ignored by zombies.
Your warning calls are also more sheep-like.
